PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Continued To Apr-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio appearing for petitioners. Counsel filed a supplemental declaration this morning. Notice problem addressed. Counsel wants to have bond fixed in the amount of $550,000. with limited powers. Court can not grant the request because notice was not proper. Court can either fix bond at $1,075,000.00 with limited powers or continue the matter for proper notice. Counsel asked for a short recess.
At10:33am, Counsel returned to court to request for a continuance to give proper notice. Matter is continued to 4/25. Court will ask the examiner to review the supplemental declaration filed today.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.
